_comment_embedding_provider: Pluggable embedding backend. 'ollama' (default) uses ollama_url + nomic search_query/search_document prefixes. 'openai' / 'openai-compatible' POST {embedding_base_url}/v1/embeddings (OpenAI, LM Studio, any OpenAI-compatible server) and read the vector from data[0].embedding. Set embedding_base_url + embedding_model to your server's values. Prefer the TOOL_COMPASS_EMBEDDING_API_KEY env var over embedding_api_key in this file (the key is a secret). embedding_query_prefix/embedding_document_prefix default to nomic search_* for ollama and empty for openai; override only if your model expects prefixes. Example OpenAI-compatible block: { "embedding_provider": "openai-compatible", "embedding_base_url": "http://localhost:1234", "embedding_model": "text-embedding-3-small", "embedding_api_key": "sk-..." }
